title: How to add API in our website

posts.author: oliviarodrigo (Olivia rodrigo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi how to add monday.com API our website ravi-gupta.com

posts.author: joseph.monday (Joseph Laux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Olivia,

If you want to connect the monday.com API to your website, you can refer to our API documentation here to help create queries to fetch data from the platform. Feel free to play around with the API using the API playground!

Best,
Joseph
